name: Apollo.io
description: Sync Apollo.io people, contacts, accounts, and sequences into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: From Apollo.io → Settings → Integrations → API → API Key.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate API key by calling POST /v1/auth/health.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping POST /v1/auth/health and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of Apollo.io contacts and accounts into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List People
methods.description: Paginated list of people from the Apollo database.

methods.name: Get Contact
methods.description: Retrieve a single contact by ID.

methods.name: Get Account
methods.description: Retrieve a single account by ID.
